race.description: Kia National Dealer Of The Year Hcp
race.comment: THEBLADE (7) failed to fire in two runs in Victoria and saves his best for the Sydney tracks. Comes out of a decent rating contest second-up when seventh over 1400m at Flemington with the apprentice aboard. Gets the right set-up today with the winkers going on. Ready to win. CROSSBOW (8) comes out a solid race when fifth to Nobler over 1600m at Randwick. Was a month between runs on that occasion and Nobler won again last Saturday. Leading contender. UNIQUE AMBITION (9) sat off the fast tempo and launched late down the outside with a sound victory over 1400m at Randwick in Midway grade. Placed at the track and hard to ignore in this vein of form. EMIRATE (5) dropped back in trip with a respectable eighth over 1200m at Randwick in a fast run contest. Out to his right trip today and look for him savaging the line.
